resources.string: Switchify enables you to use your device with adaptive switches. It scans your screen, allowing you to select a point to tap. You can also swipe, and do everything else you need to navigate your device. It also includes an item scan feature that allows you to navigate through items on your screen.
Switchify makes it easy to control your device with adaptive switches. It scans the screen, letting you tap, swipe, and navigate effortlessly.

Switchify is an accessibility service. It makes it easy to control your device with adaptive switches. It scans the screen, letting you tap, swipe, and navigate effortlessly. To do this, Switchify requires the ability to perform gestures, such as taps and swipes, and to observe the content of your screen to determine where to perform these gestures.
Gesture Lock is a Pro feature. Please upgrade to Pro to use this feature.
Gesture Lock enabled. Choose a gesture to lock to your switch. You can disable it by holding your switch.
Gesture Lock disabled. Your switches will now perform their default actions.
Cannot lock drag or custom swipe gestures. Gesture Lock disabled.
